records.ety: [Gr. <?/ a staff, or L. scapus a stem, stalk + -lite: cf. F. scapolite.]

defs: A grayish white mineral occurring in tetragonal crystals and in cleavable masses. It is essentially a silicate of alumina and soda.
notes: ☞ The scapolite group includes scapolite proper, or wernerite, also meionite, dipyre, etc.
